title: mentha × intrusa
intro: Mentha × intrusa, also known as Corsican mint or mint x intrusa, is a hybrid plant of the mint family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Mentha × intrusa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Mentha × intrusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation.
